name: Arolla Profile MP
comment:
Official ClayPaky File
FW ver 1.3
The AROLLA PROFILE MP is the smallest and lightest moving head fixture available in its class. While small in stature, it delivers powerful light output with its 470-Watt white LED engine (at over 22,000 lumens output) and is full of the features you would expect in a much larger, more expensive luminaire. eSWAP is a unique feature of this series, that is the interchangeability of the framing assembly of the profile version with the gobo module from the spot model.
